New Delhi, the 25th August, 1994 S.O. 772(E) .-In exercise of the powers conferred by section 3 of the United Nations (Privileges and Immunities) Act, 1947 (46 of 1947), the Central Government hereby' declares that the provisions of Article I (section 1), Article II (sections 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 and 8), Article III (section 9 and 10), Article IV (sections 11, 14, 15 and 16), Article V (sections 17, 18, 20 and 21), and Article VI (sections 22 and 23) of the Schedule to the said Act shall apply mutatis mutandis to the Asian Development Bank and to its representatives and officials. .• 2. This notification shall be deemed to have come into force On the It}th day of December, 1992. >~.e [F. No. UI1241iSj92j SA VITRI, KUNADI, H. Secy. EXPLANATORY N1~MORANDUM i 1 ~ • I :'.. . • ::_ The Government of India have, on 18th November, 1992 entered into an agreement to accord to the Asian Development Bank, its representatives and officials, the same privileges and immunities as-a!'! accorded to the United Nations .office~: in: India, their representatives and officials. The Resident Office of.lhe ..AlsiaI'\l?c:velo~m:nt B~n~ in ~ew ~elhi ,,:,as ~pened on 10th Deccl11b.cr. 199~. 'AccbtdmgIY, It IS necessary for this notification to be made operauvc retro- spectively from 10th December, 1992.
